# FastMCP Runtime MCP

Paid remote MCP for hosted MCP server, structured receipts, usage logs, and audit-ready evidence for agent and CI workflows.

Website: https://fastmcpruntime.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://fastmcpruntime.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://fastmcpruntime.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/fastmcp-runtime-mcp

Use case: FastMCP Runtime remote MCP for hosted MCP server.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: runtime_health_check, tool_schema_list, fastmcp_call_proxy, usage_receipt_lookup
